body_text.description: The message body. May be empty after trimming, but the field is required.

source_channel.description: The channel the message arrived on (e.g. gmail, imessage_adminme, sms_twilio).

from_identifier.description: Sender's address — email, phone number, or handle.

subject.description: Email subject. Absent for SMS / iMessage.

from_party_known.description: Has a Party already been resolved for this sender? Hint only — defaults to false in the noise_filtering pipeline.
